SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

Class BrokerGossipHandler

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components.BrokerGossipHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
GossipMessageVisitor
public class BrokerGossipHandler extends Object implements GossipMessageVisitor
Concrete visitor that applies incoming gossip messages to a Broker's local state.

Each visit method mirrors one operation that may have been performed on a remote broker — registration, channel creation, publication, etc. — and replicates its effect locally, ensuring consistency across the gossip network.

This class accesses the broker's internal state directly and must therefore reside in the same package as Broker.

See Also:
  • GossipMessageVisitor
  • Broker

    Handles an authorised users modification propagated via gossip.
